channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: No bodycam footage in fatal Madison police shooting, because the department doesn’t require cameras
item.description: As officials review widely circulated bystander videos of the fatal police shooting of a homeless man in Madison, Wisconsin, one key perspective won’t...

item.title: WATCH: Video shows seaplane crash off Washington state
item.description: Dramatic video captured the moment a tourist floatplane carrying 11 people crashed off the Washington coast near Seattle. Everyone on board survived.

item.title: Sen. Peters wants to know why ICE bought spyware that can take control of phones
item.description: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement has purchased commercial spyware that can covertly take control of phones, collect messages, photos and locat...

item.title: Iran keeps targeting American bases as U.S. interceptor stockpiles dwindle
item.description: Explosions were heard near a U.S. base in Iraq, and Iran said it targeted Bahrain, Jordan and Kuwait as the 21-week war intensifies.
